findings: **Additive, disjoint family only.** `git status` confirms the sole tracked modification is `README.md`; all family code, tests, docs, and config are new under `…/families/session/**`. No shared feature/label core, sibling family (`ohlcv`/`bbo`/`cross_market`), `labels/**`, or `governance/**` file was touched. ✅

**Contracts consumed, not re-implemented.** Verified the imported symbols exist and are used as intended: `FeatureFamily.SESSION_CALENDAR_ROLL` (contracts.py:52), `require_feature_request_implementation_allowed` + `FeatureRequestGateDecision` (request_gate.py), `is_real_trade_bar`/`is_synthetic_no_trade_bar`/`TradeBarRow` (semantics.py). The FLF-P05 gate is the only admission path; `FeatureSpec.__post_init__` itself enforces an approved gate decision when `implementation_eligible=True`, so the gate cannot be bypassed (R-003). ✅
**`available_ts` discipline.** Every `FeatureValueRecord` carries the row's `available_ts`; `_validate_trade_row` fails closed when `available_ts < bar_end_ts` or is naive/missing (R-006). ✅
**No lookahead.** Default window is `POINT_IN_TIME`/`CAUSAL`; `_require_definition` rejects non-live-compatible windows, and a parametrized test asserts centered/future windows fail closed (R-007). ✅
**Synthetic no-trade rows** retain session position but are flagged `synthetic_no_trade_position_only` and never treated as trade bars (R-012). ✅
**Absent metadata** (expiration/status) degrades to `None` + `*_metadata_absent` flags rather than fabrication. ✅

No provider calls, no raw-file access, no materialization/persistence — compute returns in-memory tuples only. No broker/live/paper/order/account, strategy/backtest/portfolio, or MVP lifecycle state. Docs/config "claims" matches are all explicit **no-claims** disclaimers. ✅
No PR/merge/deploy/destructive ops; executor left everything unstaged. `ACTIVE_CAMPAIGN.md` untouched. ✅

`git ls-files runs` empty; no `runs/` path in the handoff's staging list; no data/DB/cache/heavy artifacts. Handoff is truthful and complete (records the bare-import failure and reason, explicit-staging confirmation, DAG-disjointness). ✅

Read `test_session_family.py`: genuine coverage of the happy path **and** fail-closed paths (missing gate, pending approval, missing `available_ts`, future/centered windows, synthetic-row handling, absent metadata). No weakening, skips, or test-only branches (R-018). Canary `forbidden_test_tamper` PASS. ✅

I could not independently re-run pytest (sandbox denied the command), but the executor reports `7 passed` and the supplied `just verify-canaries` shows all 17 canaries PASS (including `forbidden_scope_drift`, `forbidden_boundary_import`, governance canaries) and `frontier-doctor` PASS.
